title: add additional fields to podman machine ls --json
body:
[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

tests are unhappy with `buildah bud`, @edsantiago is this a known issue atm?  I saw the same error in another PR and thought it wasn't a flake, may have to change my thinking on the flakiness...
Rebase needed to fix buildah-bud tests; see #12818 for details.
Merging rather then rebasing since we know what the failures are.
